integration.title: Using Both Plugins Together
integration.description: plugin-better-auth and plugin-api-permissions are designed to work together out of the box. When both are installed, plugin-better-auth automatically registers a session resolver with plugin-api-permissions — no manual wiring required.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: A collection of Strapi v5 plugins that bring Better Auth authentication and fine-grained Content API permissions to your Strapi application.

plugin-api-permissions/admin-panel.title: Admin Panel
plugin-api-permissions/admin-panel.description: The plugin adds a Roles management section to the Strapi admin panel under Settings → API Permissions → Roles.

plugin-api-permissions/plugin-api-permis.title: plugin-api-permissions
plugin-api-permissions/plugin-api-permis.description: @strapi-community/plugin-api-permissions provides Content API role-based access control (RBAC) for Strapi v5. It is auth-provider agnostic — it works with any authentication system through a pluggable session resolver interface.

plugin-api-permissions/session-resolver.title: Session Resolver
plugin-api-permissions/session-resolver.description: The session resolver is the bridge between your authentication provider and the plugin's permission system. It is called on every Content API request and must return the current user along with their assigned roles, or null for unauthenticated requests.

plugin-better-auth/better-auth-plugins.title: Better Auth Plugins
plugin-better-auth/better-auth-plugins.description: Better Auth has a rich plugin ecosystem. Any Better Auth plugin can be used with this Strapi adapter. Some plugins add new database tables that Strapi needs to know about — these require a schema generation step.

plugin-better-auth/client-setup.title: Client Setup
plugin-better-auth/client-setup.description: Better Auth provides framework-specific client helpers for React, Vue, Svelte, and more. All of them point to the Strapi-hosted Better Auth API at /api/better-auth.

plugin-better-auth/plugin-better-auth.title: plugin-better-auth
plugin-better-auth/plugin-better-auth.description: @strapi-community/plugin-better-auth is a Better Auth database adapter that uses Strapi as the database backend. It integrates Better Auth's authentication system with your Strapi application by:

plugin-better-auth/server-usage.title: Server Usage
plugin-better-auth/server-usage.description: You can interact with the Better Auth instance directly from Strapi controllers, services, and middleware.
